chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2458 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.11158/2020 2. For hearing of main case 20.02.2025 Mr. Zia-ul-Hassan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zohaib Korai advocate holds brief for Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioner states that this petition impugns a demand notice that has been issued without any show cause notice. Learned counsel for the respondent department admits to the aforesaid and states that he has no cavil for the same to be set aside subject to the department retaining a right to issue fresh show cause notice if permissible under the law. Under these circumstances, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petition may be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
